title: Evaluation Result
description: The complete output of the evaluation engine. Provides the advisor with an overall verdict, per-rule results with execution traces, missing information, conditions to meet, advisory notes, and next steps. For multi-program screening, includes per-program verdicts.

evaluation_id.description: Unique identifier for this evaluation run

university_id.description: For single_program mode. Null for multi_program_screening.

program_id.description: For single_program mode. Null for multi_program_screening.

overall_verdict.description: 'eligible' = meets all requirements. 'not_eligible' = fails one or more reject rules. 'conditional' = eligible if specific conditions are met. 'needs_review' = flagged for human review. 'insufficient_data' = cannot complete evaluation due to missing profile information.

overall_summary.description: Concise human-readable summary of the verdict for the advisor

confidence.description: How confident the engine is in this result. Self-reported scores, pending documents, or override usage lowers confidence.

level.description: 'definitive' = all data verified, no overrides. 'high' = minor caveats. 'moderate' = some self-reported data or assumed documents. 'low' = significant missing data. 'cannot_determine' = too much missing.

rule_results.description: Per-rule evaluation outcomes, in evaluation order

stage.description: Which evaluation stage this rule belongs to

status.description: 'skipped_dependency' = a dependency rule failed so this was not evaluated. 'skipped_override' = advisor override caused this to be skipped.

actual_value.description: The value found in the applicant's profile

exception_applied.description: Exception ID if an exception overrode this rule's failure

condition_trace.description: Recursive execution trace for debugging. Shows which condition nodes were evaluated, their results, and data accessed. Structure mirrors the condition tree from the rule set.

items.description: Recursive trace nodes for composite/conditional conditions

data_sources_used.description: Which profile fields were accessed during evaluation. E.g. ['education_history.0.grading.value', 'personal_info.nationality'].

missing_information.description: Data points the engine needed but could not find or verify in the applicant profile

field.description: Dot-path to the missing or incomplete field

description.description: What is missing, in advisor-friendly language

impact.description: 'blocks_evaluation' = cannot determine verdict without this. 'may_change_outcome' = verdict could change if this data is provided. 'informational' = nice to have.

conditions_to_meet.description: Conditions the applicant must meet to become eligible. Populated when any rule with on_fail 'conditional_accept' has failed. Appears for 'conditional' verdicts (always) and 'needs_review' verdicts (when conditional_accept and flag_for_review failures coexist). Never appears for 'not_eligible', 'eligible', or 'insufficient_data' verdicts.

deadline.description: By when this must be met, if applicable

advisory_notes.description: Tips, alternatives, and edge case warnings for the advisor. Not tied to pass/fail — these are informational.

matched_programs.description: Only present for multi_program_screening mode. Per-program verdict summary.

blocking_rules.description: Rule IDs that caused failure, if any

next_steps.description: Recommended actions for the advisor, applicant, or system to take after this evaluation

action.description: E.g. 'Submit IELTS certificate', 'Apply through uni-assist', 'Contact admissions office for exception'

evaluation_metadata.description: Technical metadata about the evaluation run

overrides_applied.description: List of categories or rule_ids that were overridden by advisor
